channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game discs for new releases starting in 2028 - Fox Business
item.description:
1. Sony to end physical PlayStation game discs for new releases starting in 2028  Fox Business
  2. Physical disc production ending in January 2028 for new games releasing on PlayStation consoles  PlayStation.Blog
  3. Last bastion for physical media falls as Sony dumps PlayStation discs  Financial Times
  4. Sony announces end of PlayStation discs, parts of digital store in the same day  Ars Technica
  5. PlayStation abandons physical games as Xbox and Sony lose sight of players  Windows Central

item.title: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype - The Verge
item.description:
1. Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype  The Verge
  2. Exclusive | SpaceX Showed Investors Prototype of Elon Musk’s New AI Device  WSJ
  3. Rumors of SpaceX developing an AI-powered smartphone sent Qualcomm’s shares soaring, but Elon Musk swiftly denied the claim, dampening market enthusiasm.  Moomoo
  4. SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish  TechCrunch
  5. Report Suggests SpaceX Is Testing A Handheld AI Device, Musk Says It's 'Utterly False'  Engadget

item.title: Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Apple's Hide My Email feature has a bug that's been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims  TechCrunch

item.title: Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection  The Verge
  3. Xbox reportedly testing a way to digitize physical games in the wake of PlayStation killing game discs — feature said to go back to Xbox One-era games  Tom's Hardware
  4. New details emerge on Xbox 'Positron', Microsoft's disc-to-digital program — as it seems likely Xbox Helix will drop discs too  Windows Central
  5. Xbox's New Console, Project Helix, Will Reportedly Not Have a Disc Drive  IGN

item.title: New BioShocking attack manipulates AI browser into data theft - BleepingComputer
item.description:

item.title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million - The Verge
